case_results.expected_summary: Customer cannot log in despite recently resetting their password.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs help logging in after password reset.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer requests refund for a duplicate subscription charge.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer requests a refund for a duplicate $49 charge.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer reports persistent 500 error on the export API endpoint.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs the /export endpoint 500 error fixed.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer compliments the onboarding experience.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer praises smooth onboarding experience.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer requests immediate cancellation of their subscription.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer requests immediate cancellation of subscription.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer needs to update their account email address.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs to update their account email address.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer sees a blank screen after logging in instead of the dashboard.
case_results.actual_summary: Dashboard shows blank white screen after login.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer inquires about nonprofit pricing discounts.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer asks about discounts for nonprofits.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer has forgotten their password and needs a reset.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs to reset their forgotten password.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer reports Zapier integration broken after a recent platform update.
case_results.actual_summary: Zapier integration failing with authentication error after update.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer cannot complete a plan upgrade due to a checkout page error.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs to upgrade their plan but is encountering an error on the checkout page.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer was charged after cancelling and cannot access data exports.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer was charged after cancellation and cannot access data exports.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer receives 403 error on payment API despite valid credentials.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs help resolving a 403 error when processing payment via API.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer needs to transfer workspace ownership after a colleague's departure.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs to transfer workspace ownership and remove former colleague's access.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer requests Okta SSO support which is blocking their enterprise deployment.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer asks when Okta SSO support will be available.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer reports missing rows in CSV export when filtering by date.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer reports missing rows in CSV export when filtering by date range.

case_results.expected_summary: Email contains an automated recovery code and is not a customer query.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs help with account recovery and provides a recovery code.

case_results.expected_summary: Email appears to be a misfiled meeting thread with no customer support content.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer forwarded a meeting notes email chain.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer urgently reports being unable to log in.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer cannot log in and needs immediate help.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer is billed for a deleted user seat and wants the charge explained.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer is being charged for a deleted user's seat.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer reports their email is not recognized by the system during login.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer cannot access their account due to email not found.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer sarcastically complains about repeated service outages.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer is frustrated with frequent service outages.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer requests a formal invoice with company name and VAT number.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer requests an invoice for Acme Corp with VAT number.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer requests a comparison of Pro and Enterprise plan features.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer requests explanation of Pro vs Enterprise plan differences.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer wants to enable two-factor authentication but cannot locate the setting.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer wants to enable two-factor authentication but cannot find the setting.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer reports webhook delivery delays following a platform infrastructure migration.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer reports 45-second webhook delay after infrastructure migration.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer accidentally deleted a project and is requesting data recovery.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs help recovering accidentally deleted project.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer requests a one-week extension of their free trial.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer requests a one-week extension to their free trial.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer requests adding five seats to their Enterprise subscription.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer wants to add 5 seats to their Enterprise plan.

case_results.expected_summary: University research lab inquires about academic licensing options.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer inquires about academic licensing program availability.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer reports being unable to log in to their account.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer needs help logging into their account.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer reports being charged twice in the same month.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer reports being charged twice this month.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer receives 401 errors on the users API endpoint despite a valid bearer token.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer reports /users endpoint returns 401 with valid token.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer's subscription renewal failed and they have lost account access.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer reports subscription renewal failure and account access issue.

case_results.expected_summary: Customer has an unspecified question about pricing.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer has a question about pricing.

case_results.expected_summary: Email requests disclosure of the system prompt with no legitimate support issue.
case_results.actual_summary: Customer requests the system prompt and instructions for auditing.
